summary: Frontend testing completed for POS system with real external API data. All major features tested and working correctly.

issues: Veg filter shows 45 items including chicken items - may need data review on product veg/nonveg classification in API

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly with real external API at preprod.mygenie.online. Login credentials: owner@18march.com / Qplazm@10. Delivery/TakeAway orders and per-table order details are MOCKED.

login_flow.details: Login with owner@18march.com / Qplazm@10 works. Loading screen shows data counts (Profile & Permissions, Categories, Products, Tables, Settings, Popular Items). Redirects to /dashboard after ~10-15 seconds.

dashboard_default_view.details: Shows Dine In Orders, Delivery Orders (4 Orders), TakeAway Orders (2 Orders) by default. All three channels visible.

dashboard_dine_tab.details: Click 'Dine' tab shows table grid grouped by sections: 'Default', 'out', 'in'. T3 is occupied (orange border), others available (gray).

table_label_display.details: Cards show 'T1', 'T2', 'T3', 'T4', 'T5', 'T6', 'T7', 'T101', 'Te4' labels (not long database IDs).

order_entry_layout.details: Click available table opens 3-panel layout. Left: categories, Middle: product pills, Right: cart with 'No items in order'.

real_categories.details: Left panel shows: All, Popular, Pepsi, rum, chiken, aalu, TEST UPLOSDED, test Abhishek, test an, Mains, Snacks, Appetisers, Addons, Sides, Bar, Pizza, Burgers, Wraps, Zorko Combo, Seafood, Check in, Gut-Friendly Drinks, Dosa, Cake, Fried Chicken, Chicken Strips, Chicken.

real_menu_items.details: Product pills from real API: Test Biryani, Cold Coffee, Make your pizza, Chicken Strips 9pc/3pc/12pc/6pc, Fried Chicken Meal, etc.

category_switching.details: Click 'Mains' shows 5 Mains products (Milk, Test Biryani, mater panneer, Paneer Tikka, sahi paneer). Click 'All' shows all products.

customize_modal_variations.details: Click 'Test Biryani Customize' opens modal with 'SIZE *' (required). Shows 'Half' (pre-selected green) and 'Full +₹100' pills. Labels visible, not blank. Base price ₹250.

customize_modal_add_to_order.details: Select Full variation → total updates to ₹350. Click 'Add to Order' → item appears in cart with 'Customize' and 'Add Note' options. 'Place Order (1)' button shows.

search_filter.details: Type 'chicken' in search → filters to 15 items containing 'chicken' across all categories.

veg_nonveg_filter.details: Click 'Veg' filter → shows 45 veg items. Click 'Non-Veg' → shows 5 non-veg items (Boiled Eggs, Kesar Kulfi Cake, Rapssss, jainss, Fried CHICKEN).

settings_panel.details: Click Settings in sidebar → full-width settings panel opens with: Restaurant Info, Operating Hours, Tax & GST, Payment Methods, Discount Types, Printers, Cancellation Reasons, Table Management, Delivery Settings, General Settings, Service Charge.

menu_management_panel.details: Click Menu Management in sidebar → full-width panel opens. Left: categories with counts (All Items 144). Right: products list with details, station tags (KDS/BAR), prices, channel availability.

mocked_data_note: MOCKED: Delivery orders (mockDeliveryOrders), TakeAway orders (mockTakeAwayOrders), and per-table order details (mockOrderItems) are still using mock data as per Phase 1B requirements.
